checks.evidence: Metadata SHA-256 593ba7ea2d021c61f24324083f6a38a738068c79bb68e11b532c2cc36dbf9296 and patch SHA-256 0c235ecbd049cc826edacf9626223742441ff5dae7da2fd64bea1338fe137f1a matched the seal.

checks.name: sealCompleteness
checks.evidence: Seal is complete with exit code 0, 251 events, and final event hash afdafb56d6db2031cbab118d060c62893bb150dff5a068397bd63c9b719127e1.

checks.name: eventHashChain
checks.evidence: Sequences 0 through 250 are contiguous; every previousHash link and canonical JSON event hash verified.

checks.name: chronology
checks.evidence: Captured timestamps are monotonic. All 40 tool_execution_start events have one later tool_execution_end with the same call ID and tool name.

checks.name: canonicalDelegatedTask
checks.evidence: The first user message exactly equals the English metadata canonicalTask prefixed by the harness delegation header; sourceUserMessageIncluded is false.

checks.name: thinkingContentAbsent
checks.evidence: No thinking, reasoning, or analysis key and no thinking content block occurs in the sealed events. Observable message blocks are text and toolCall only.

checks.name: promptToolModelProvenance
checks.evidence: Workflow bdd-java, agent spec-driven, prompt bdd-java-spec-driven-v4, agent definition hash f7265db508f2dfa459e80005f045252e80ef8047a8614fb6802597ec375ca1d0, tool registry fingerprint 58f9fb4ff63c4ac748fcf030b843b8687a38b4aab2362dd8974d2b5b32f7776b, and model openai-codex/gpt-5.6-sol are present and internally consistent.

checks.name: gitProvenance
checks.evidence: Initial head 13de845ed8076f849efd3375aedbfdda9e23c9c6 and tree f7bbc031dae169e5f82404dc5c1ab5b75386609e are sealed. Final head is unchanged; sealed status contains only the retained RED specification change.

checks.name: frameworkIncidentEvidence
checks.evidence: javaspec 2f2d07452c527d20531760efb4a80cfb60feebdf generated an Object occurredAt stub and reordered constructor types; selected execution was BROKEN 1/1 with no matching constructor. The production stub was reverted and GREEN was not attempted.

checks.name: sanitization
checks.evidence: The raw trace and machine-specific reports were not copied. Repository artifacts contain only sanitized summaries, hashes, relative project paths, and the bounded patch.
